mapper.sql: t.id, t.publisher_id, t.title, t.description, t.category, t.location, t.reward, t.status, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.is_deleted, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_X(t.location_point::geometry) END AS longitude, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_Y(t.location_point::geometry) END AS latitude
CASE t.category WHEN 0 THEN 'EXPRESS' WHEN 1 THEN 'STUDY' WHEN 2 THEN 'SECOND_HAND' WHEN 3 THEN 'TEAM_UP' ELSE 'OTHER' END
CASE WHEN t.status IN (1, 2) THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN t.status = 3 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN t.status = 4 THEN 'OFFLINE' ELSE 'OPEN' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task ( publisher_id, title, description, category, location, location_point, reward, status ) VALUES ( #{publisherId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{location}, CASE WHEN #{longitude} IS NOT NULL AND #{latitude} IS NOT NULL THEN ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography ELSE NULL END, #{reward}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, location = #{location}, location_point = CASE WHEN #{longitude} IS NOT NULL AND #{latitude} IS NOT NULL THEN ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography ELSE NULL END, reward = #{reward}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, is_deleted), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_task t WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title, t.description, AS category, AS status, t.reward, t.location, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_X(t.location_point::geometry) END AS longitude, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_Y(t.location_point::geometry) END AS latitude, u.id AS publisherId, u.nickname AS publisherName, u.avatar_url AS publisherAvatarUrl, u.department AS publisherDepartment, u.credit_score AS publisherCreditScore, COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) AS favoriteCount, CASE WHEN tf.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorited, t.create_time AS createdAt, t.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM t_task_favorite GROUP BY task_id ) f ON f.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN t_task_favorite tf ON tf.task_id = t.id AND tf.user_id = #{viewerId} WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task SET status = #{newStatus}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task WHERE publisher_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
